home.subtitle: Your knitting/crochet assistant
home.description: Malaine helps you create, customize, and complete your knitting and crochet projects with the help of AI.

adapt_patterns.title: Adapt Patterns
adapt_patterns.description: Customize existing patterns to your desired measurements and yarn type.

interactive_editor.title: Interactive Editor
interactive_editor.description: Modify patterns with our visual editor and see changes in real-time.

ai_assistant.title: AI Assistant
ai_assistant.description: Get help with techniques, calculations, and troubleshooting from our smart assistant.

dashboard.title: Your Dashboard
dashboard.content: Here you'll find your projects, patterns, and personalized preferences.
